```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement threat modeling for system architecture"
---
# Threat Modeling
## Task
Perform threat modeling on system architecture.
## Requirements
1. Create data flow diagrams (DFD) for the system. 2. Identify trust boundaries.
3. Apply STRIDE methodology to each component. 4. Rate threats by DREAD or CVSS.
5. Define mitigations for identified threats.
## Constraints
- Cover all external-facing components first. Review threat model with each architecture change.
## Success Criteria
- All critical components modeled. Threats identified and rated. Mitigations defined.
```
